docs.title: Image-Toolkit Documentation
docs.text: Image-Toolkit is an integrated image database and editing framework that bridges high-performance computer vision (PyTorch, OpenCV, C++/pybind11) with robust web automation (Selenium) and cross-platform accessibility.

docs.title: Key entry points
docs.text:
# Tauri web app (recommended)
npm run dev

# Python PySide6 desktop GUI
source .venv/bin/activate && python main.py

# Hydra CLI (training, embedding, ComfyUI)
python -m backend.dispatcher command=train

# ASP benchmark suite
pytest backend/test/animation/ --skip-gpu

# Rust doc generation
cd base && cargo doc --no-deps --open

docs.title: Stack versions
docs.text: Component Required Python 3.11+ Rust 1.70+ Node.js 18+ PostgreSQL 14+ pgvector 0.5.0+ Android SDK API 26+ iOS / Xcode 16+ / 15+

docs.title: Module Dependency Graph
docs.text:
The following diagram shows the high-level inter-module dependencies for Image Toolkit. Edges point from consumer → provider (i.e. "depends on").

flowchart TD
    subgraph Entry["Entry Points"]
        MAIN["main.py\n(PySide6 launch)"]
        CLI["backend/dispatcher.py\n(Hydra CLI)"]
        TAURI["frontend/src-tauri/\n(Tauri desktop)"]
        API["api/\n(Django REST)"]
    end

    subgraph GUI["Desktop GUI  ·  gui/"]
        TABS["Tabs\n(convert, wallpaper,\nlistings, merge…)"]
        WORKERS["QThread Workers\n(ImageLoaderWorker,\nRecommendationWorker)"]
        LRU["LRUImageCache\n(gui/src/utils/)"]
    end

    subgraph Backend["Python Backend  ·  backend/"]
        CTRL["(Hydra dispatcher)"]
        ANIMMOD["animation/\n(ASP pipeline)"]
        MODELS["models/\n(PyTorch ML)"]
        DB["image_database.py\n(pgvector)"]
        VAULT["vault_manager.py\n(JPype / JVM)"]
        RECENG["Recommendation-Engine/\n(SQLite + cosine RRF)"]
    end

    subgraph CppCore["C++ Core  ·  base/"]
        RUST["pybind11 extension\n(image_converter,\nfile_system, crawlers)"]
        RUSTMATH["math/\n(stats, distance,\ninformation)"]
    end

    subgraph Data["Data Layer"]
        PG[("PostgreSQL\n+ pgvector")]
        SQLITE[("SQLite\nrec_engine.db")]
        FS["File System\n(image library)"]
    end

    subgraph Crypto["Cryptography  ·  cryptography/"]
        KOTLIN_CRYPTO["Kotlin AES-256-GCM\n(.vault files)"]
    end

    subgraph Mobile["Mobile  ·  app/"]
        ANDROID["Android\n(Kotlin / Jetpack)"]
        IOS["iOS\n(Swift / SwiftUI)"]
    end

    subgraph Ext["Browser Extension  ·  extension/"]
        EXT["Manifest V3\nContext-menu save"]
    end

    %% Entry → GUI / Backend
    MAIN --> TABS
    CLI --> CTRL
    TAURI --> Backend
    API --> Backend

    %% GUI internals
    TABS --> WORKERS
    WORKERS --> LRU
    TABS --> Backend

    %% Backend internals
    CTRL --> ANIMMOD
    CTRL --> MODELS
    ANIMMOD --> MODELS
    CTRL --> DB
    DB --> PG
    CTRL --> RECENG
    RECENG --> SQLITE

    %% Backend → Rust
    Backend --> RUST
    RUST --> FS
    RUST --> RUSTMATH

    %% Vault
    CTRL --> VAULT
    VAULT --> KOTLIN_CRYPTO

    %% Mobile
    ANDROID --> Backend
    IOS --> Backend
    ANDROID --> KOTLIN_CRYPTO
    IOS --> KOTLIN_CRYPTO

Key constraints enforced by this topology:

Rule Rationale No blocking I/O on the Qt main thread PySide6 GUI freezes if gui/ workers do heavy work inline QFileDialog must use DontUseNativeDialog GTK portal + JPype JVM → __dynamic_cast SIGSEGV on Linux No QWebEngineView Chromium Vulkan/GBM init conflicts with JPype JVM RTTI QPixmap only on main thread; workers emit QImage Qt threading contract C++ core is a shared library loaded at runtime pybind11/CMake; built as a Python extension module (.so) via just build-base No SQLite in the main app (PostgreSQL + pgvector only) Recommendation-Engine/ uses SQLite as a standalone sub-project

This document provides detailed Mermaid diagrams for the two anime/scan stitching pipelines:

  • _merge_images_scan_stitch — lightweight OpenCV SCANS-mode baseline (10 steps)
  • perfect_stitch / AnimeStitchPipeline — 13-stage research pipeline with deep-learning models, bundle adjustment, temporal rendering, and hard-partition compositing

The diagrams are intentionally verbose: every algorithmic parameter, conditional branch, model, and fallback path is documented.

Mermaid compatibility: All diagrams target v8.8.0. direction inside subgraphs and ~~~ links require v9+ and are not used here.

docs.title: 1a. _merge_images_scan_stitch (simple)
docs.text:
flowchart TD
    S1["Read images - cv2.imread"] --> S2["cv2.Stitcher - mode=SCANS 1"]
    S2 --> S3["setRegistrationResol 0.8"]
    S3 --> S4["stitch()"]
    S4 --> S5["BGR to RGB - Save output"]

docs.title: 1b. perfect_stitch / AnimeStitchPipeline (13 stages)
docs.text:
flowchart TD
    A1["Stage 1: Load + dark-border trim"] --> A2["Stage 2: Lanczos width normalise"]
    A2 --> A3["Stage 3: BaSiC photometric correction"]
    A3 --> A4["Stage 4: BiRefNet foreground masking"]
    A4 --> A45["Stage 4.5: Background photometric normalise"]
    A45 --> A56["Stages 5-6: Pairwise feature matching"]
    A56 --> A7["Stage 7: Global bundle adjustment - LM"]
    A7 --> A8["Stage 8: ECC sub-pixel refinement"]
    A8 --> A9["Stage 9: Canvas geometry sizing"]
    A9 --> A10["Stage 10: Temporal renderer - median / first / blend"]
    A10 --> MFSR["Optional MFSR super-resolution pass"]
    MFSR --> A11["Stage 11: Hard-partition foreground composite"]
    A11 --> A13["Stage 13: Morphological boundary crop"]
    A13 --> DONE["Save PNG / WEBP"]

docs.title: 2. _merge_images_scan_stitch — Detailed Flowchart
docs.text:
Source: backend/src/core/image_merger.py:129

This method wraps OpenCV's built-in SCANS stitcher with minimal preprocessing. It is also used as the fallback inside AnimeStitchPipeline when no valid feature edges are found.

flowchart TD
    IN["image_paths: List[str] / output_path: str"] --> NOCL
    NOCL["cv2.ocl.setUseOpenCL(False)\nPrevents malloc corruption in OpenCL path"] --> L1

    L1["for path in image_paths:\n  img = cv2.imread(path)"] --> L2{"img is None\nor img.size == 0?"}
    L2 -- "yes" --> L3["warn + skip"]
    L2 -- "no" --> L4["append to cv_images"]
    L3 --> VALID
    L4 --> VALID

    VALID{"len(cv_images) < 2?"} -- "yes" --> ERR["raise ValueError:\nNeed at least 2 valid images"]
    VALID -- "no" --> C1

    C1["try: cv2.Stitcher_create(mode=1)\nSCANS mode - affine/flat transforms"] --> C2
    C2["except AttributeError:\ncv2.createStitcher(True)\nLegacy OpenCV fallback"] --> RESOL

    RESOL["stitcher.setRegistrationResol(0.8)\nHardcoded: 0.8 - default is 0.6\nHigher = more keypoints = better for small overlaps"] --> STITCH

    STITCH["status, pano = stitcher.stitch(cv_images)"] --> CLEANUP
    CLEANUP["cv2.destroyAllWindows()\nForce-release highgui / Qt resources"] --> CHECK

    CHECK{"status == cv2.Stitcher_OK?"} -- "no" --> ERRMAP
    CHECK -- "yes" --> CONV

    ERRMAP["Map error code:\n  ERR_NEED_MORE_IMGS\n  ERR_HOMOGRAPHY_EST_FAIL\n  ERR_CAMERA_PARAMS_ADJUST_FAIL\nraise RuntimeError"]

    CONV["cv2.cvtColor(pano, BGR to RGB)\nImage.fromarray(pano_rgb)"] --> SAVE
    SAVE["merged_image.save(output_path)\nreturn Image"]

docs.title: Key Parameters
docs.text: Parameter Value Source Stitcher mode 1 (SCANS — affine/flat) Hardcoded Registration resolution 0.8 Hardcoded (OpenCV default is 0.6) OpenCL Disabled Hardcoded (prevents malloc corruption) Feature detector ORB/AKAZE (OpenCV default) Inside OpenCV Matcher BFMatcher / FLANN Inside OpenCV Homography RANSAC Inside OpenCV

docs.title: 3. perfect_stitch / AnimeStitchPipeline — Full Pipeline
docs.text: Entry point: backend/src/core/image_merger.py:737 Orchestrator: backend/src/animation/pipeline.py:87

docs.title: 3.1 Parameter Resolution Chain
docs.text:
flowchart LR
    D["Hard-coded defaults
in perfect_stitch()"] --> Y["stitch.yaml
backend/config/core/stitch.yaml"]
    Y --> K["Explicit kwargs
call-site overrides"]
    K --> FINAL["Resolved params
passed to AnimeStitchPipeline(**params)"]

docs.title: Default Parameter Values
docs.text: Parameter Default Type Description use_basic False bool Enable BaSiC flat-field correction use_birefnet True bool Enable BiRefNet foreground masking use_loftr True bool Enable LoFTR dense matching use_ecc False bool Enable ECC sub-pixel refinement renderer "median" str "median" / "first" / "blend" composite_fg True bool Hard-partition foreground composite motion_model "translation" str "translation" (2-DOF) / "affine" (4-DOF) edge_crop 80 int Pixels to crop from all sides at output laplacian_bands 8 int Bands for multi-band blend renderer mfsr_mode False bool Enable MFSR super-resolution pass mfsr_n_dct_iter 20 int DCT restoration iterations mfsr_use_prior True bool Enable prior injection in MFSR mfsr_use_diffusion False bool Enable diffusion inpainting in MFSR stitch_net_ckpt "" str Path to AnimeStitchNet checkpoint

docs.title: 3.2 Stage 1 — Frame Loading and Dark-Border Trim
docs.text:
Module: backend/src/animation/canvas.py:17 (_load_frames) Helper: backend/src/animation/stateless.py (_trim_dark_border)

flowchart TD
    P["image_paths: List[str]"] --> R
    R["cv2.imread(path)"] --> NIL{"img is None?"}
    NIL -- "yes" --> SKIP["warn + skip frame"]
    NIL -- "no" --> TRIM["_trim_dark_border(img)\nDetects broadcast letterbox bars\nScans rows/cols for rows where\nmean pixel is below dark threshold\nCrops until non-dark content found"]
    TRIM --> APP["append to frames list"]
    SKIP --> CHECK
    APP --> CHECK
    CHECK{"len(frames) < 2?"} -- "yes" --> ERR["raise ValueError"]
    CHECK -- "no" --> NEXT["Stage 2"]

docs.title: 3.3 Stage 2 — Width Normalisation
docs.text:
Module: backend/src/animation/canvas.py:30 (_normalise_widths)

flowchart TD
    IN["frames: List[ndarray]"] --> TW["target_w = frames[0].shape[1]"]
    TW --> CHECK{"w != target_w?"}
    CHECK -- "yes" --> RESIZE["cv2.resize\nInterpolation: INTER_LANCZOS4\nnh = round(h x target_w / w)\nPreserves aspect ratio"]
    CHECK -- "no" --> KEEP["keep as-is"]
    RESIZE --> OUT["Stage 3"]
    KEEP --> Out["Stage 3"]

docs.title: 3.4 Stage 3 — BaSiC Photometric Correction
docs.text:
Module: backend/src/animation/photometric.py Activated by: use_basic=True

flowchart TD
    GATE{"use_basic == True
AND _BASIC_OK?"} -- "no" --> SKIP["Stage 3 skipped"]
    GATE -- "yes" --> B1

    B1["BaSiCWrapper.fit(frames, luma_only=True)
Returns: flat_field, dark, baselines
baselines = per-frame dimming scalar
Broadcast dimming if b_i less than 0.75"] --> B2

    B2["Apply spatial flat-field ONLY
baseline_override=1.0
Per-frame b_i correction intentionally skipped:
Applying it destroys inter-frame brightness
continuity causing colour seams at boundaries
Deferred to _render_median at Stage 10"] --> V1

    V1["Sample luma from 5 evenly-spaced frames
Downsample to 320px wide
Use 75th percentile across stack"] --> V2

    V2["Fit quadratic vignette model:
G(r) = 1 / (1 + k * r^2)
via scipy.least_squares
bounds: k in range 0 to 0.5"] --> V3{"k_val less than 0.01?"}

    V3 -- "yes" --> V4["No vignette detected - skip correction"]
    V3 -- "no" --> V5["k_val *= 0.7 (soften)
k_val *= 0.4 (conservative clamp)
Final effective multiplier: 0.28x
gain_map = 1 + k_val * r_norm^2
Apply per-channel to all frames"]
    V4 --> NEXT["Stage 4
baselines list passed to Stage 10"]
    V5 --> NEXT

docs.title: 3.5 Stage 4 — BiRefNet Foreground Masking
docs.text:
Module: backend/src/animation/masking.py (_compute_fg_masks) Constants: _FOREGROUND_DILATION=16, _FOREGROUND_EROSION=8

flowchart TD
    GATE{"use_birefnet == True\nAND _BIREFNET_OK?"} -- "no" --> NONE["Return None for each frame\nAll pixels treated as background"]
    GATE -- "yes" --> A1

    A1{"hasattr(wrapper,\nget_background_mask)?"} -- "New API" --> NEW
    A1 -- "Legacy API" --> LEG

    NEW["wrapper.get_background_mask(img,\n  dilate_px=16,\n  erode_px=8)\nResult: 255=background, 0=foreground\n_FOREGROUND_DILATION=16px safety margin\n_FOREGROUND_EROSION=8px boundary sharpening"]

    LEG["wrapper.get_mask(img) returns 255=foreground\nbg = bitwise_not(fg)\nManual dilation with elliptical kernel\nKernel size: 2*16+1 = 33px"]

    NEW --> OFFLOAD
    LEG --> OFFLOAD

    OFFLOAD["Offload BiRefNet from GPU\ntorch.cuda.empty_cache()\nFree VRAM before matching stage"] --> NEXT["bg_masks: List[Optional[ndarray]]\nStage 4.5"]

docs.title: 3.6 Stage 4.5 — Background Photometric Normalisation
docs.text:
Module: backend/src/animation/pipeline.py:420 (inline in run())

flowchart TD
    IN["frames + bg_masks"] --> S1

    S1["For each frame: sample pixels where bg_mask greater than 127\ncompute mean BGR colour"] --> S2{"len bg_pixels >= 1000?"}
    S2 -- "yes" --> S3["bg_frame_means[i] = pixel_mean"]
    S2 -- "no" --> S4["bg_frame_means[i] = None"]
    S3 --> COUNT
    S4 --> COUNT

    COUNT{"valid means >= 3?"} -- "no" --> SKIP["Skip normalisation"]
    COUNT -- "yes" --> N1

    N1["ref_mean = np.median(valid_means, axis=0)\nRobust median eliminates\nanime cel flicker / temporal brightness variation"] --> N2

    N2["For each frame with valid mean:\ngain = ref_mean / bg_frame_mean[i]\ngain = clip(gain, 0.88, 1.14)\nGain clamp prevents over-correction"] --> N3{"gain approx 1.0?"}

    N3 -- "no" --> N4["frames[i] = clip(frame * gain, 0, 255)"]
    N3 -- "yes" --> SKIP2["skip - no change needed"]
    N4 --> NEXT["Stages 5-6"]
    SKIP2 --> NEXT

docs.title: 3.7 Stages 5-6 — Pairwise Feature Matching
docs.text: Module: backend/src/animation/matching.py

docs.title: 3.7.1 Edge Graph Construction
docs.text:
flowchart TD
    N["N frames"] --> P1["Adjacent pairs i to i+1\nN-1 pairs"]
    N --> P2["Skip-1 pairs i to i+2\nN-2 pairs"]
    N --> P3["Skip-2 pairs i to i+3\nN-3 pairs"]
    P1 --> MATCH["_match_pair(i, j) for each pair"]
    P2 --> MATCH
    P3 --> MATCH
    MATCH --> FILTER["_filter_edges(edges)\nGeometric consistency + Direction consensus"]
    FILTER --> RESULT["edges: List[Dict]\nkeys: i, j, M 2x3, pts_i, pts_j, weight"]

docs.title: 3.7.2 Per-Pair Matching Fallback Chain
docs.text:
flowchart TD
    START["_match_pair(frames, bg_masks, i, j)"] --> CROP

    CROP["Edge Crop pre-match distortion removal:
ec_h = H * 0.05  _MATCH_EDGE_CROP=0.05
ec_w = W * 0.05
Crop 5% from all sides before matching"] --> ATT1

    ATT1["Attempt 1: LoFTR Dense Matching
loftr_wrapper.match(img_i_c, img_j_c)
Returns: pts1, pts2, conf"] --> L2{"len pts1 >= 30?"}
    L2 -- "no" --> ATT2_START
    L2 -- "yes" --> L3["Filter: keep only bg points
both masks greater than 127
_MIN_LOFTR_INLIERS=20 required after filter"]
    L3 --> L4{"motion_model?"}
    L4 -- "translation" --> L5["dx = median(pts2[:,0] - pts1[:,0])
dy = median(pts2[:,1] - pts1[:,1])
M = [[1,0,dx],[0,1,dy]]"]
    L4 -- "affine" --> L6["cv2.estimateAffine2D
  pts1, pts2
  method=cv2.RANSAC
  ransacReprojThreshold=5.0
Require at least 15 RANSAC inliers"]
    L5 --> DXCHECK{"dx valid?
abs(dx) less than W * 0.01
_MAX_DX_DRIFT_RATIO=0.01
Vertical pans have near-zero horizontal drift"}
    L6 --> DXCHECK
    DXCHECK -- "no" --> ATT2_START
    DXCHECK -- "yes" --> SUCCESS["M found - skip remaining attempts"]

    ATT2_START["Attempt 2: Template Match Fallback
_template_match(img_i_c, img_j_c, mask_i, mask_j, H_c)"] --> T2
    T2["Bidirectional search:
Config A: bottom of i in top of j  dy greater than 0 downward pan
Config B: top of i in bottom of j  dy less than 0 upward pan
slice_h=256  template strip height
max_search_frac=0.8  ROI = 80% of frame height
max_dy_frac=0.70  reject abs dy greater than 70% of H
Enforces minimum 30% frame overlap
direction_sign=0 bidirectional by default
cv2.matchTemplate TM_CCORR_NORMED with mask"] --> T4{"conf greater than 0.6
AND conf greater than _MIN_TEMPLATE_SCORE 0.85?"}
    T4 -- "yes" --> SUCCESS2["M found"]
    T4 -- "no" --> ATT3A

    ATT3A["Attempt 3a: Masked Phase Correlation
g_i = _highpass(_luma(img_i_c))
g_j = _highpass(_luma(img_j_c))
High-pass filter isolates edges removes DC
Zero out foreground pixels mask == 0
Prevents moving characters biasing shift
Hanning window
cv2.phaseCorrelate(g_i, g_j, hann)
Returns shift=(dx,dy), response"] --> PC4{"response greater than 0.25
abs(dx) less than W * 0.01?"}
    PC4 -- "yes" --> SUCCESS3["M found"]
    PC4 -- "no" --> ATT3B

    ATT3B["Attempt 3b: Unmasked Phase Correlation
Same as 3a but use_mask=False
Character provides dominant phase signal
when background is uniform
Minimum response: _PC_CONF_THRESHOLD=0.05"] --> PU2{"response greater than 0.15
abs(dx) less than W * 0.01?"}
    PU2 -- "yes" --> SUCCESS4["M found"]
    PU2 -- "no" --> FAIL["All methods failed - edge dropped"]

    SUCCESS --> BUILD["Build edge dict:
Enforce translation-only M
rotation and scale locked to identity
Build pts_i / pts_j anchor points
weight = mean_conf"]
    SUCCESS2 --> BUILD
    SUCCESS3 --> BUILD
    SUCCESS4 --> BUILD

docs.title: 3.7.3 Edge Filter
docs.text:
flowchart TD
    EDGES["raw edges list"] --> G1

    G1["Geometric Consistency Filter:\nBuild adj_map: i to dx,dy for adjacent edges i to i+1"] --> G2["For each skip-pair edge i to j where j greater than i+1:\nsum adjacent dx,dy from i to j"]
    G2 --> G3{"diff_x less than 15.0\nAND diff_y less than 15.0?"}
    G3 -- "yes" --> G4["Keep edge"]
    G3 -- "no" --> G5["Reject: inconsistency"]
    G4 --> DIR
    G5 --> DIR

    DIR["Direction Consensus Filter - requires 3 or more adjacent edges:\nCollect dy values from all adjacent edges\nmedian_dy = np.median(adj_dys)\nconsensus_sign = sign(median_dy)"] --> D2

    D2["Estimate velocity from filename timestamps:\n_ts_pat: _(digits)ms pattern in filename\nvel_px_per_ms = median(dy_e / interval_ms)"] --> D3

    D3["For each adjacent edge i to i+1:\nwrong_sign: sign(dy) != consensus_sign\ngross_outlier: abs(dy) greater than 2 x abs(median_dy)\n              AND abs(dy - median_dy) greater than 200px\nvelocity outlier: abs(dy - expected) greater than max(15%, 15px)"] --> OUTCHECK{"outlier detected?"}

    OUTCHECK -- "yes" --> D4["Replacement priority:\n1. velocity estimate: M_fix dy = vel_px_per_ms * interval, weight=0.55\n2. directed template match direction_sign=consensus_sign, weight=conf*0.7\n3. median fallback: M_fix dy = median_dy, weight=original*0.3"]
    OUTCHECK -- "no" --> D5["Keep edge as-is"]
    D4 --> RESULT["Filtered edges - Stage 7"]
    D5 --> RESULT

docs.title: 3.8 Stage 7 — Global Bundle Adjustment
docs.text:
Module: backend/src/animation/bundle_adjust.py (_bundle_adjust_affine)

flowchart TD
    IN["edges, N frames, motion_model"] --> DOF{"motion_model == affine?"}

    DOF -- "yes" --> D2["4-DOF Partial Affine
params per frame: a, b, tx, ty
Matrix: [[a, b, tx], [-b, a, ty]]
Preserves aspect ratio
Prevents fan / spiral distortion"]
    DOF -- "no" --> D3["2-DOF Translation only
params per frame: tx, ty
Matrix: [[1,0,tx],[0,1,ty]]"]

    D2 --> INIT
    D3 --> INIT

    INIT["Initialisation x0:
All frames: identity a=1, b=0, tx=0, ty=0
Sequential forward pass:
  for f in 1 to N:
    tx_f = tx_(f-1) - M_raw[0,2]
    ty_f = ty_(f-1) - M_raw[1,2]
Canvas convention: ty_j = ty_i - dy
(dy = y_j - y_i measured by LoFTR / PC)"] --> OPT

    OPT["scipy.optimize.least_squares
  residuals, x0
  method=trf
  ftol=1e-6, xtol=1e-6, gtol=1e-6
  max_nfev = iterations * N
  iterations=200 hardcoded"] --> RES

    RES["Residual function:
Data term: (p_i_global - p_j_global) * weight
Anchor term: (x[0:4] - identity) * 2000.0
  Frame 0 pinned at identity reg_anchor=2000
Identity prior: (a_f - 1.0) * 1e5
                (b_f - 0.0) * 1e5
  Keeps a approx 1, b approx 0 globally"] --> OUT

    OUT["List of ndarray(2,3) - one per frame
Stage 8"]

docs.title: 3.9 Stage 8 — ECC Sub-Pixel Refinement
docs.text:
Module: backend/src/animation/ecc.py (_ecc_refine) Activated by: use_ecc=True

flowchart TD
    GATE{"use_ecc == True?"} -- "no" --> SKIP["Stage 8 skipped
Keep BA affines as-is"]
    GATE -- "yes" --> ITER

    ITER["For each frame i in 1 to N relative to i-1:
ref = _luma(frames[i-1])
src = _luma(frames[i])
mask = bg_masks[i-1]
Compute relative transform init:
  tx_rel = M_prev[0,2] - M_i[0,2]
  ty_rel = M_prev[1,2] - M_i[1,2]"] --> PYR

    PYR["Gaussian Pyramid ECC coarse to fine:
for lvl in range(_ECC_PYRAMID_LEVELS-1, -1, -1):
  _ECC_PYRAMID_LEVELS=4
  scale = 2^lvl
  r_s = resize(ref, 1/scale, INTER_AREA)
  s_s = resize(src, 1/scale, INTER_AREA)
  M_s = M_cur scaled by 1/scale"] --> P2

    P2["cv2.findTransformECC
  r_s, s_s, M_s
  cv2.MOTION_TRANSLATION
  criteria: EPS|COUNT, _ECC_MAX_ITER=80, _ECC_EPS=1e-4
  ecc_mask=bg_mask_scaled
  gaussFiltSize=5
Scale result back: tx_s *= scale
Propagate to next finer level"] --> CLAMP

    CLAMP{"abs(tx_new - tx_ba) greater than 80px
OR abs(ty_new - ty_ba) greater than 80px?
_ECC_MAX_DRIFT=80px"} -- "yes" --> CL2["Reject ECC result
Keep BA result unchanged"]
    CLAMP -- "no" --> CL3["Accept ECC refined global affine"]
    CL2 --> OUT["Refined affines - Stage 9"]
    CL3 --> OUT

docs.title: 3.10 Stage 9 — Canvas Construction
docs.text:
Module: backend/src/animation/canvas.py:43 (_compute_canvas)

flowchart TD
    IN["frames + affines"] --> CORNERS["For each frame i:
corners = [[0,0],[w,0],[w,h],[0,h]]
warped = M[:2,:2] @ corners.T + M[:2,2]
Collect all warped corners"]
    CORNERS --> BBOX["min_xy = all_corners.min(axis=0)
max_xy = all_corners.max(axis=0)"]
    BBOX --> TG["T_global = -min_xy
canvas_w = ceil(max_xy[0] - min_xy[0])
canvas_h = ceil(max_xy[1] - min_xy[1])"]
    TG --> CAP["canvas_w = min(canvas_w, 32768)
canvas_h = min(canvas_h, 32768)
_CANVAS_MAX_DIM=32768 OOM guard"]
    CAP --> OFFSET["Apply T_global to all affines:
affines[i][0,2] += T_global[0]
affines[i][1,2] += T_global[1]"]
    OFFSET --> NEXT["canvas_h, canvas_w - Stage 10"]

docs.title: 3.11 Stage 10 — Temporal Renderer
docs.text:
Module: backend/src/animation/rendering.py

flowchart TD
    DISP{"renderer param?"} -- "median" --> MED["_render_median()"]
    DISP -- "first" --> FIRST["_render_first()"]
    DISP -- "blend" --> BLEND["_render_laplacian()"]
    MED --> OUT["canvas, valid_mask, warped_corr, warped_fgs\nOptional MFSR - Stage 11"]
    FIRST --> OUT
    BLEND --> OUT

docs.title: Median Renderer (default — Overmix temporal denoising)
docs.text:
flowchart TD
    M1["Sequential colour correction
_compute_sequential_color_gains:
  N_STRIPES=12 horizontal stripes per overlap
  STRIPE_H=40 rows per stripe
  MIN_BG_PX=200 bg pixels required
  Robust: median ratio across stripes
  Gain clamp: 0.88 to 1.12
  Bias clamp: -20 to 20
  MAX_SAFE_GAIN_DEV=0.14 suppress large corrections"] --> M2

    M2["Chunk rendering memory-safe:
chunk_size = min(1024, 1GB / N*W*3)
For y0 to H in chunks:
  warpAffine each frame into chunk
    flags=INTER_LANCZOS4
    borderMode=BORDER_CONSTANT
  Apply BaSiC baselines if available:
    scale = min(1/max(b_i, 0.5), 1.25)
  Apply colour gain and bias correction
  stack shape: N, chunk_h, W, 3"] --> M3

    M3["Pixel aggregation:
count==1: take single sample directly
count greater than 1: np.nanmedian(stack_f32, axis=0)
  NaN-mask excludes unwarped pixels"] --> M4

    M4["Fade-in/out correction:
_FADE_ROWS=250 rows each side of frame entry/exit
_LANCZOS_BLEED=8px extension for Lanczos kernel bleed
Alpha ramp: 0 to 1 entry or 1 to 0 exit
Blend: (1-alpha)*med_without_i + alpha*med_with_i
Eliminates horizontal seam on new frame entry"] --> M5

    M5["Animation detection skipped if ty_span greater than 25% canvas H:
Per-pixel FFT along temporal axis
AC/DC power ratio: ratio = AC / (DC + AC)
anim_mask: ratio greater than ac_threshold=0.25
Morphological open+close with 5x5 ellipse kernel
Require min_anim_pixels=500
Re-render animation region from majority phase group:
  Edge-signature KMeans clustering
  n_clusters = max(2, min(8, N//2))
  n_init=5, random_state=0"]

docs.title: First-Frame-Wins Renderer
docs.text:
flowchart TD
    F1["Process frames in reverse order
warpAffine with INTER_LINEAR
Each frame overwrites earlier frames
First frame wins for each pixel
No blending - fastest renderer"]

docs.title: Laplacian Blend Renderer
docs.text:
flowchart TD
    BL1["Sequential colour matching frame by frame:
gain = ref_std / src_std, clip 0.85 to 1.18
bias = ref_mean - src_mean * gain, clip -15 to 15
Requires more than 5000 overlap pixels"] --> BL2
    BL2["Sequential ROI blending:
feather=40px border around overlap bounding box
Distance transform soft weight map
FG pixels forced to weight=1.0 hard paste"] --> BL3
    BL3["_laplacian_blend(img, canvas, weight_roi)
laplacian_bands=8 from perfect_stitch default
laplacian_bands=5 pipeline constant _LAPLACIAN_BANDS"]

docs.title: 3.12 Optional MFSR Super-Resolution Pass
docs.text:
Module: backend/src/animation/mfsr/ Activated by: mfsr_mode=True

flowchart TD
    GATE{"mfsr_mode == True?"} -- "no" --> SKIP["Skip MFSR
Keep median canvas"]
    GATE -- "yes" --> R1

    R1["PSO Registration - pso_registration.py
PSO_SWARM_SIZE=40
PSO_MAX_ITER=150
PSO_INERTIA=0.729
PSO_C1=PSO_C2=1.494 cognitive/social
PSO_VEL_CLAMP=0.2"] --> R2

    R2["DRL Registration - drl_registration.py
DRL_STATE_SIZE=256
DRL_ACTION_DIM=4: dx, dy, dscale, dtheta
DRL_GAMMA=0.99
DRL_LR=1e-4
DRL_MEMORY_SIZE=10000
DRL_BATCH_SIZE=64"] --> S1

    S1["DCT Restoration - dct_restoration.py
DCT_BLOCK_SIZE=8
mfsr_n_dct_iter default 20
Standard JPEG luminance quantization table
Reverse-quantizes compression artifacts"] --> S2

    S2["Prior Injection - prior_injection.py
mfsr_use_prior default True
Injects spatial frequency priors"] --> S3{"mfsr_use_diffusion?"}

    S3 -- "yes" --> S4["Diffusion Inpainting - diffusion_inpaint.py
Fill canvas gaps via score-based diffusion"]
    S3 -- "no" --> S5["DE Seam Removal - de_seam.py
DE_POP_SIZE=30
DE_MAX_GEN=100
DE_F=0.8 mutation scale
DE_CR=0.9 crossover rate"]
    S4 --> S5
    S5 --> REFRESH["Refresh valid_mask
valid = canvas.max(axis=2) greater than 0
Stage 11"]

docs.title: 3.13 Stage 11 — Hard-Partition Foreground Composite (Deghost)
docs.text:
Module: backend/src/animation/compositing.py (_composite_foreground) Activated by: composite_fg=True AND use_birefnet=True

flowchart TD
    IN["canvas temporal median
frames, affines, bg_masks"] --> CENTERS

    CENTERS["Strip ownership ordering:
strip_center_ys[i] = affines[i][1,2] + frame_h[i] / 2
order = argsort(strip_center_ys)
initial_boundaries = midpoints between sorted centres"] --> WARP

    WARP["Warp all N frames to full canvas:
cv2.warpAffine(frame, affine, W,H
  flags=INTER_LANCZOS4
  borderMode=BORDER_CONSTANT)"] --> PASS1

    PASS1["Pass 1 Boundary Search pre-normalisation:
_find_optimal_boundaries on raw frames
_SEARCH_RANGE=250px each side of midpoint
_SEARCH_SLAB=20 row height for scoring
Score = 0.4 * bg_diff + 0.6 * total_diff
bg pixels preferred: both masks agree
Minimum 50 valid pixels to score
Boundaries spaced at least 2*_SEARCH_SLAB apart"] --> LSNORM

    LSNORM["Global Brightness Normalisation:
Least-squares log-gain minimisation:
  min sum_k w_k*(alpha_k - alpha_{k+1} - log_ratio_k)^2 + lambda*sum_i*alpha_i^2
  lambda=5e2 regularisation
Prefer bg pixels: both frames agree, mu greater than 50
Fallback: all-pixel at weight*0.8
Gains clamped 0.70 to 1.45
Apply per-frame gain in-place to warped_list"] --> PASS2

    PASS2["Pass 2: Re-run boundary search on normalised frames
Adaptive feather lookup _FEATHER_TABLE:
  diff <=  5.0: feather=300px
  diff <= 10.0: feather=250px
  diff <= 20.0: feather=200px
  diff <= 35.0: feather=150px
  diff <= 50.0: feather=100px
  diff >  50.0: feather= 80px  _FEATHER_MIN
Cap: feather <= nat_overlap//2 AND <= _FEATHER_MAX=300"] --> SEAM

    SEAM["Per-boundary colour correction and DP seam paths:
Measure photometric calibration at overlap zone
SLAB_HALF=25 rows each side of y_cut
Compare SAME canvas rows in both frames
Prefer bg pixels mu greater than 50, delta less than 12%
Gain clamp: GAIN_CLAMP_LOCAL = 0.72 to 1.40
DP seam cut _seam_cut:
  Energy = diff + 0.5*|grad(diff)|
         + 15 * (edges_img1 + edges_img2)
  edge_weight=15.0 avoids outlines in either frame
  DP left to right pass on transposed matrix
  Backtrack: minimum energy path
  seam_path[x] = y-coordinate of cut at column x"] --> COMP

    COMP["Chunk composite CHUNK=512 rows:
Hard-partition rows outside seam zones:
  strip_weights[owner_frame, y] = 1.0
  weighted average by content presence
Seam-zone rows:
  Per-column cosine feather centred on DP path
  d_seam = local_y - seam_path[x]
  t_blend = clip(1 - abs(d_seam)/zone_half, 0, 1)
  gain_fa = 1 + t_blend*(1/sqrt(gain_seam) - 1)
  gain_fb = 1 + t_blend*(sqrt(gain_seam) - 1)
  t_lin = clip((d_seam + zone_half)/(2*zone_half), 0, 1)
  t_hf = 0.5*(1 - cos(pi*t_lin)) half-cosine
  result = (1-t_hf)*fa_corr + t_hf*fb_corr"] --> RAMP

    RAMP["Post-composite seam colour ramp:
_apply_canvas_seam_correction
ramp_half = min(250, half_above, half_below)
_SEAM_MEAS_SLAB=40 rows for measurement
Trigger: abs(delta) greater than _SEAM_STEP_THRESHOLD=1.5
Reject: ratio greater than _SEAM_MAX_RATIO=1.35 scene content
Gain clamp: _GAIN_CLAMP = 0.88 to 1.14
Apply cosine ramp over +/- ramp_half rows
Above seam: gain 1/sqrt(gains) at seam to 1.0 at far edge
Below seam: gain sqrt(gains) at seam to 1.0 at far edge"] --> OUT
    OUT["Updated canvas - Stage 13"]

docs.title: 3.14 Stage 13 — Boundary Crop
docs.text:
Module: backend/src/animation/canvas.py:75 (_crop_to_valid)

flowchart TD
    IN["canvas + valid_mask"] --> C1["row_has_content = any(valid_mask > 0, axis=1)
col_has_content = any(valid_mask > 0, axis=0)
r0..r1 = first and last row with content
c0..c1 = first and last col with content
O(H+W) projection-based crop"]
    C1 --> C2["canvas = canvas[r0:r1, c0:c1]"]
    C2 --> E1{"edge_crop > 0?"}
    E1 -- "yes" --> E2["canvas = canvas[ec:-ec, ec:-ec]
Default ec=80px in perfect_stitch
Default ec=30px in AnimeStitchPipeline init
Removes vignette and distortion from warped edges"]
    E1 -- "no" --> E3["skip edge crop"]
    E2 --> SAVE["cv2.cvtColor BGR to RGB
Image.fromarray(rgb)
out.save(output_path)
gc.collect()"]
    E3 --> SAVE

20+ bg inliers"]

pair skipped"]

docs.title: 6. Constants Quick Reference
docs.text: All tunable constants live in backend/src/animation/constants.py.

docs.title: Core Stitching
docs.text: Constant Value Description _LAPLACIAN_BANDS 5 Pyramid depth for multi-band blend _ECC_MAX_ITER 80 ECC termination: max iterations _ECC_EPS 1e-4 ECC termination: convergence epsilon _ECC_PYRAMID_LEVELS 4 Gaussian pyramid levels for ECC _MIN_LOFTR_INLIERS 20 Min bg inliers after LoFTR mask filter _MAX_DX_DRIFT_RATIO 0.01 Max horizontal drift (1% of width) _MATCH_EDGE_CROP 0.05 Pre-match edge trim fraction (5%) _MIN_TEMPLATE_SCORE 0.85 Min TM_CCORR_NORMED confidence _PC_CONF_THRESHOLD 0.05 Min phase-correlation response _CANVAS_MAX_DIM 32768 Hard OOM cap on canvas _MEDIAN_MIN_SAMPLES 3 Min valid samples for median render _FOREGROUND_DILATION 16 BiRefNet mask dilation (px) _FOREGROUND_EROSION 8 BiRefNet mask erosion (px) _SMOOTHSTEP_BLEND_PX 96 Fallback blend height

docs.title: Compositing (compositing.py)
docs.text: Constant Value Description _FEATHER_MAX 300 Max feather half-width _FEATHER_MIN 80 Min feather half-width _GAIN_CLAMP (0.88, 1.14) Per-boundary photometric gain limit _SEQ_SAMPLE_HALF 40 Rows each side for gain estimation _SEQ_MIN_PX 200 Min pixels for reliable gain est. _SEARCH_RANGE 250 Boundary search radius (px) _SEARCH_SLAB 20 Row height for boundary scoring _SEAM_RAMP_HALF 250 Post-composite ramp half-width _SEAM_MEAS_SLAB 40 Rows for seam colour measurement _SEAM_STEP_THRESHOLD 1.5 Min colour step to trigger ramp _SEAM_MAX_RATIO 1.35 Max ratio before treating as content

docs.title: MFSR Constants
docs.text: Constant Value Description PSO_SWARM_SIZE 40 PSO: swarm particle count PSO_MAX_ITER 150 PSO: max iterations PSO_INERTIA 0.729 PSO: inertia weight PSO_C1 / PSO_C2 1.494 PSO: cognitive/social coefficients PSO_VEL_CLAMP 0.2 PSO: velocity clamp fraction DE_POP_SIZE 30 DE: population size DE_MAX_GEN 100 DE: max generations DE_F 0.8 DE: mutation scale factor DE_CR 0.9 DE: crossover rate DCT_BLOCK_SIZE 8 DCT: block size (JPEG-standard) DCT_ITERATIONS 20 DCT: default restoration iterations DRL_STATE_SIZE 256 DRL: state feature dimension DRL_ACTION_DIM 4 DRL: action space (dx,dy,dscale,dtheta) DRL_GAMMA 0.99 DRL: discount factor DRL_LR 1e-4 DRL: learning rate DRL_MEMORY_SIZE 10000 DRL: replay buffer size DRL_BATCH_SIZE 64 DRL: training batch size

docs.title: Image-Toolkit Backend & Base Performance Benchmarks
docs.text: Comprehensive benchmark suite for measuring memory usage and compute time across the Python backend, C++ base layer, and TypeScript analytics math backbone.

docs.title: Benchmark Suite Index
docs.text: Suite Runner Location Output CI job Database Python benchmark/bench_database.py backend/benchmark/ results/benchmark_*.json benchmark.yml ML Models Python benchmark/bench_models.py backend/benchmark/ results/benchmark_*.json benchmark.yml Image Processing Python benchmark/bench_image_ops.py backend/benchmark/ results/benchmark_*.json benchmark.yml C++ Base just test-base-cpp base/tests/ ctest output benchmark.yml ASP Corpus backend/benchmark/bench_anime_stitch.py backend/benchmark/ data/output/benchmark_report.md manual Frontend Math npm test / TypeDoc frontend/src/math/ Jest output docs.yml (type-check)

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text:
# Install benchmark dependencies
pip install memory_profiler psutil pytest-benchmark matplotlib

# Build C++ base module
just build-base-release

docs.title: Quick Start (All Benchmarks)
docs.text:
# Python backend benchmarks
python benchmark/run_all.py

# C++ base tests (includes timing benchmarks)
just test-base-cpp

# Combined report
python benchmark/generate_report.py

docs.title: Individual Benchmark Suites
docs.text:
# Database operations
python benchmark/bench_database.py

# ML model inference
python benchmark/bench_models.py

# Image processing (Python wrappers)
python benchmark/bench_image_ops.py

# Memory profiling only
python benchmark/memory_profile.py

docs.title: 1. Database Operations (bench_database.py)
docs.text:
• Tag insertion (1k, 10k tags)
  • Group/subgroup operations
  • Vector similarity search (100, 1k, 10k images)
  • Bulk image insertion
  • fetchall() vs fetchmany() comparison

Metrics: Query time, peak RAM, PostgreSQL buffer usage

docs.title: 2. ML Model Inference (bench_models.py)
docs.text:
• Siamese network (ResNet-18) embedding generation
  • GAN (AnimeGAN2) single-image generation
  • Stable Diffusion 3 (if model available)
  • Model load/unload time
  • CUDA vs CPU comparison

Metrics: Inference time, VRAM usage, CPU RAM, model load time

docs.title: 3. Image Processing (bench_image_ops.py)
docs.text:
• Image conversion (single, batch of 100/1000)
  • Image merging (horizontal, vertical, grid)
  • Video thumbnail generation
  • Duplicate detection (pHash, SIFT, SSIM, ORB)

Metrics: Processing time, peak RAM, throughput (images/sec)

docs.title: 4. C++ Base Operations (base/tests/)
docs.text:
• File system scanning (1k, 10k, 100k files)
  • Image conversion (C++ native via OpenCV)
  • Board crawler HTTP operations
  • Cloud sync operations

Metrics: Execution time, peak RAM

docs.title: 5. Frontend Analytics Math (frontend/src/math/)
docs.text:
The TypeScript math backbone (stats.ts, distance.ts, linalg.ts, signal.ts, colormap.ts, graph.ts, benchmark.ts) is validated by:

  • Type checking: npx tsc --noEmit (run by docs.yml CI and tsc-check pre-commit hook)
  • TypeDoc generation: npx typedoc --entryPointStrategy expand --out site/api/typescript src/math

benchmark.ts is the analytics computation layer — it is consumed by the Tauri dashboard, not run standalone. Its key exports and what they compute:

Export What it computes computeEfficiency(benchmarks) Composite efficiency score (0–100) and throughput per benchmark computeMemoryVsTimeScatter(benchmarks) Memory vs time bubble chart data computeMemoryBreakdown(benchmarks) Stacked baseline/delta/leaked breakdown detectRegressions(current, baseline) Time and memory regression detection vs a stored baseline computeTimingBreakdown(timing) ASP stage-by-stage time breakdown as % of total computeMetricComparisons(datasets) ASP vs Simple per-metric deltas across all datasets computeSeamQualityHeatmap(datasets) Per-dataset seam quality scores in [0,1] space verdictSummary(datasets) Counts of asp_better / simple_better / comparable / no_data computeAlignmentDrift(datasets) Coefficient of variation for dy/dx steps per dataset computePhotometricProfile(datasets) Per-frame gain applied per dataset computePerSeamDetail(datasets) Per-seam ghost/NCC/color scores computeFallbackReasonDistribution(datasets) Fallback reason taxonomy with counts computeGtComparisons(datasets) SSIM/PSNR/aligned-SSIM vs ground truth
